title: Macroglena setigera
taxonomy: Macroglena setigera is a species of liverwort, which belongs to the class Marchantiopsida. This class is a part of the division Marchantiophyta, which comprises all liverworts. The division Marchantiophyta is further classified under the kingdom Plantae, which includes all plant species. Liverworts, including Macroglena setigera, are non-vascular plants that primarily consist of leafy, flat structures. Macroglena setigera is also a member of the family Calypogeiaceae.
